allow: Bash(# Check Obsidian version from config *)

Bash(for ver in 2.19.3 2.20.0 2.20.1 2.21.0 2.22.0; do
  min=$\(curl -sL -x http://127.0.0.1:7891 "https://github.com/silentvoid13/Templater/releases/download/$ver/manifest.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; print\(json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('minAppVersion','?'\)\)" 2>/dev/null\)
  echo "$ver → minAppVersion: $min"
done)

Bash(python3 -c "
import re

filepath = 'Clippings/AI 伦理与安全  菜鸟教程.md'
with open\(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
result = []
in_code_block = False
fix_lines = []

# Same regex as the template
code_escape_re = re.compile\(r'\\\\\([_*#\\[\\]]\)'\)
ordered_list_re = re.compile\(r'\(\\d+\)\\\\\\.'\)

for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    if line.strip\(\).startswith\('\\`\\`\\`'\) or line.strip\(\).startswith\('~~~'\):
        in_code_block = not in_code_block
        result.append\(line\)
        continue

    if in_code_block:
        before = line
        cleaned = code_escape_re.sub\(r'\\1', line\)
        cleaned = ordered_list_re.sub\(r'\\1.', cleaned\)
        if cleaned != before:
            fix_lines.append\(\(i+1, before[:60], cleaned[:60]\)\)
        result.append\(cleaned\)
    else:
        result.append\(line\)

cleaned_content = '\\n'.join\(result\)
if cleaned_content != content:
    with open\(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        f.write\(cleaned_content\)
    print\(f'✅ 修复完成，共修正 {len\(fix_lines\)} 行'\)
    print\(\)
    print\('修复详情（前20行）：'\)
    for lineno, before, after in fix_lines[:20]:
        print\(f'  L{lineno}: {before}'\)
        print\(f'     -> {after}'\)
    if len\(fix_lines\) > 20:
        print\(f'  ... 还有 {len\(fix_lines\)-20} 行'\)
else:
    print\('✅ 未发现需要修复的转义'\)
")
Bash(sed -n '243,260p' "Clippings/AI 应用场景  菜鸟教程.md" | cat -A)
Bash(grep -n '^```' "Clippings/AI 应用场景  菜鸟教程.md")
Bash(sed -n '245p' "Clippings/AI 应用场景  菜鸟教程.md" | xxd | head -5)
Bash(sed -n '243,350p' "Clippings/AI 应用场景  菜鸟教程.md")

Bash(cat "Clippings/AI 应用场景  菜鸟教程.md" | python3 -c "
import sys, re

content = sys.stdin.read\(\)
lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
result = []
in_code_block = False
fix_count = 0

# Match escaped chars common in clipped articles inside code blocks
code_escape_re = re.compile\(r'\\\\\\\\\([_*#\\[\\]\\-]\)'\)
ordered_list_re = re.compile\(r'\(\\d+\)\\\\\\\\\\.'\)

for line in lines:
    stripped = line.lstrip\(\)
    if stripped.startswith\('\\`\\`\\`'\) or stripped.startswith\('~~~'\):
        in_code_block = not in_code_block
        result.append\(line\)
        continue

    if in_code_block:
        before = line
        cleaned = code_escape_re.sub\(r'\\1', line\)
        cleaned = ordered_list_re.sub\(r'\\1.', cleaned\)
        if cleaned != before:
            fix_count += 1
        result.append\(cleaned\)
    else:
        result.append\(line\)

cleaned_content = '\\n'.join\(result\)
changed = cleaned_content != content
print\(f'changed={changed}, fix_count={fix_count}'\)
# Write to temp file for verification
with open\('/tmp/test_cleaned.md', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(cleaned_content\)
")
Bash(sed -n '250,260p' "Clippings/AI 应用场景  菜鸟教程.md")
Bash(cp ".obsidian/plugins/templater-obsidian/data.json" "/tmp/templater-settings-backup.json" && echo "✅ 设置已备份到 /tmp/templater-settings-backup.json")
